dashboardPage.subtitle: Hal eeg oo ku saabsan liiskaaga, codsiyada kaydka, iyo shirkadaha.

charts.topProductsByValue: Badeecadaha sare ee qiimaha jumlada kaydka
charts.catalogValueByCompany: Qiimaha liiska sida shirkad kasta tahay

lowStock.title: Kaydka yar ee liiskaaga
lowStock.empty: Ma jiraan badeecado ka hooseeya heerka kaydka ugu yar.

breakdown.wholesaleValueHint: Isku darka (tirada kaydka x qiimaha jumlada) ee badeecad kasta oo liiskaaga ku jirta.
breakdown.unitsShippedOutHint: Isku darka tirada codsiyada kaydka ee la ansixiyay oo dhan.
breakdown.noApprovedRequests: Wali ma jiraan codsiyo la ansixiyay.
breakdown.valueShippedOutHint: Isku darka (tirada x qiimaha jumlada hadda) ee codsi kasta oo la ansixiyay. Wuxuu isticmaalaa qiimaha jumlada hadda ee badeecada, ee maahan qiimihii markii la ansixiyay.
breakdown.noSubmittedProducts: Wali ma jiraan badeecado lagu daray kaydka guud.
breakdown.allSubmitted: Dhammaan badeecadaha waa lagu daray kaydka guud.

companiesPage.title: Shirkadahayga
companiesPage.subtitle: Shirkadaha aad maamulayso oo aad badeecadaha hoos ka qaybiso.
companiesPage.empty: Wali ma jiraan shirkado. Samee mid si aad u bilowdo inaad badeecado ku darto.

deleteDialog.title: Tirtir shirkadda
deleteDialog.bodyPrefix: Tani si joogto ah ayay u tirtiri doontaa
deleteDialog.bodySuffix: . Tan lama soo celin karo. Haddii badeecado weli ka hoos jiraan, tirtiriddu way joogsan doontaa.

productsPage.title: Badeecadayda
productsPage.subtitle: Badeecadaha aad qeybiso, oo loo kala saaray shirkadahaaga. Gudbinta kaydka waxay u dirtaa codsi ansixin maamul ka hor inta aan lagu darin kaydka guud.

deleteDialog.title: Tirtir badeecada
deleteDialog.bodyPrefix: Tani si joogto ah ayay u tirtiri doontaa
deleteDialog.bodySuffix: liiska badeecadaada gaarka ah. Tani ma saamayso kaydka horey loogu gudbiyay.

toasts.submissionRequested: Gudbinta waa la codsaday — waxay sugaysaa ansixinta maamulka

stockRequestsPage.title: Codsiyada Kaydka
stockRequestsPage.subtitle: Codsiyada maamulaha iyo maarayaha ee kaydka laga doonayo badeecadahaaga. Ansixintu si toos ah ayay tirada la codsaday ugu gudbisaa kaydka guud.

toasts.approved: Codsiga waa la ansixiyay waana lagu daray kaydka guud

categoriesPage.title: Qaybaha
categoriesPage.subtitle: Eeg qaybaha lagu isticmaalo kaydka guud.
